# 🛡️ Security Policy

> [!IMPORTANT]
> Security is a top priority for Dev Studio. If you believe you have found a security vulnerability in this project, please report it to us immediately using the instructions below. **Do not open a public issue** to report security vulnerabilities.

---

## 📅 Supported Versions

The table below outlines which versions of Dev Studio are currently receiving security updates.

| Version                    | Status        | Security Support                                                                   |
| -------------------------- | ------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **v1.x.x (Local Stack)**   | 🟢 Active     | Fully supported. Active security patches are applied directly.                     |
| **v0.9.x (Legacy Replit)** | 🔴 Deprecated | No longer supported. We recommend upgrading to the modern local stack immediately. |

---

## 🛠️ How to Report a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability, please send a detailed email to **m.ssaid356@gmail.com** with the subject line `[SECURITY VULNERABILITY] Dev Studio`.

### 📝 What to Include in Your Report

Please provide as much detail as possible to help us reproduce and resolve the issue quickly. This should ideally include:

1. **Description**: A summary of the vulnerability and its potential impact.
2. **Steps to Reproduce**: Detailed step-by-step instructions (or a proof-of-concept exploit script).
3. **Environment Details**: Operating system, Node.js version, and any relevant database/browser setup details.
4. **Suggested Remediation**: (Optional) If you have ideas on how to fix the issue, please share them!

### ⏳ What to Expect

- **Acknowledgment**: We will acknowledge receipt of your vulnerability report within **48 hours**.
- **Investigation**: We will investigate the issue and notify you of our findings as soon as possible.
- **Resolution**: Once a vulnerability is confirmed, we will work on a patch and notify you when the fix is deployed.
- **Disclosure**: We will coordinate with you to determine a responsible disclosure timeline.

Thank you for helping keep Dev Studio safe and secure!
